scripts.copy-assets: cp index.html dist/index.html && cp electron/tooltip.html dist/electron/tooltip.html && cp electron/tooltip-preload.js dist/electron/tooltip-preload.js

shx cp index.html dist/index.html && shx cp electron/tooltip.html dist/electron/tooltip.html && shx cp electron/tooltip-preload.js dist/electron/tooltip-preload.js && shx cp electron/agent.html dist/electron/agent.html && shx cp electron/agent-preload.js dist/electron/agent-preload.js
